entity.description:
• Daily lightweight facial moisturiser with SPF 50+ UVB/UVA protection, hyaluronic acid and 3 essential ceramides
• Hydrates for up to 24 hours & provides broad spectrum UV protection.
• Gentle on skin, fragrance-free, non-comedogenic, oil-free and non-greasy and blendable & no white cast
• Suitable for all skin types.

displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: • CeraVe AM Facial Moisturising Lotion SPF50 is a daily lightweight facial moisturiser, with SPF 50 UVB/UVA protection, hyaluronic acid and 3 essential ceramides, helping to protect the skin’s natural barrier and leave skin feeling soothed and hydrated for up to 24 hours.​

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
Directions:
1. After cleansing, use pump applicator to dispense product onto fingertips, or directly onto skin
2. Apply liberally to face and neck in the morning.
3. Avoid contact with eyes. If contact occurs rinse thoroughly with water.

product.description:
• Non-Comedogenic, Oil-Free And Fragrance-Free.
• Developed With Dermatologists.
• Accepted By The National Eczema Association.

metaData.Key Information:
• Lightweight, non-greasy cream is applied to the face and neck for hydrated skin all day long.
• SPF30 UV protection blocks UVA and UVB rays to protect the skin from the sun.
• Enriched with 3 essential ceramides and hyaluronic acid, it moisturizes continuously for 24 hours thanks to mve technology and restores the skin barrier.
• Enriched with niacinamide to soothe, reduce redness and inflammation.
metaData.Preparation:
• Directions:
•1. After Cleansing, Use Pump Applicator To Dispense Product Onto Fingertips, Or Directly Onto Skin
•2. Apply Liberally To Face And Neck In The Morning.
• Caution:
•1. Avoid Contact With Eyes. If Contact Occurs Rinse Thoroughly With Water.

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care

product.description:
• Contains sodium hyaluronate (Hyaluronic Acid) to hydrate and protect the skin’s barrier. Learn more about the benefits of hyaluronic acid for skin.
Non-comedogenicskincare products are those that are formulated in a way that does not block pores.

• This cleanser cleans and hydrates normal to dry skin. If you have very dry, rough, or bumpy skin, the SA Smoothing Cleanser contains 0.5% salicylic acid, plus niacinamide to smooth and soften skin.

• Suitable for normal to dry skin
• Gently removes dirt, oil and makeup without leaving skin tight or dry
• MVE Technology: This patented delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for all day hydration
• Ceramides: Help restore and maintain the skin’s natural barrier
• Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain the skin’s natural moisture
• Non-comedogenic, non-irritating and fragrance-free
• Developed with dermatologists
• Accepted by the National Eczema Association

metaData.Ingredients:
Hydrating Cleanser 473Ml
Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Phenoxyethanol, Stearyl Alcohol, Cetyl Alcohol, Peg-40 Stearate, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Glyceryl Stearate, Polysorbate 20, Ethylhexylglycerin, Potassium Phosphate, Disodium Edta,Dipotassium Phosphate, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Ceramide Np,Ceramide Ap, Phytosphingosine, Cholesterol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Xanthan Gum, Carbomer, Tocopherol, Ceramide Eop

Cerave Moisturising Cream 15Ml
Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cetyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Petrolatum, Dimethicone,Phenoxyethanol,Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Potassium Phosphate,Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Disodium Edta,Dipotassium Phosphate, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Phytosphingosine, Cholesterol,Xanthan Gum, Carbomer, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol,Ceramide Eop
metaData.Key Information:
• Cleanses and hydrates without disrupting the protective skin moisture barrier.

• CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser was developed with dermatologists to cleanse and refresh the skin without over-stripping it or leaving it feeling tight and dry. Featuring three types of essential ceramides for skin to help strengthen the skin’s protective barrier and hydrating hyaluronic acid, this non-comedogenic face wash is an effective yet non-irritating way to start off any skincare regimen for normal to dry skin—and it uses MVE Technology to provide 24 hour hydration.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Wet skin with lukewarm water
2. Massage the cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion
3. Rinse and gently pat skin dry.

product.name: Cerave Foaming Cleanser

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• Blemish Control Cleanser with Salicylic Acid: Helps visibly reduce blemishes and the appearance of pores and blackheads from the skin's surface, while helping to prevent future breakouts.

• Lightweight Texture: Unique clear gel formula transforms into a light, foaming blemish control face wash to gently remove dirt and excess oil from skin's surface without leaving skin feeling stripped of moisture.

• Oil-Absorbing: Purifying Clay helps to absorb excess oil and visibly reduce clogged pores while niacinamide comforts skin.

• Essential Ceramides: This effective cleanser for blemish-prone skin contains three essential ceramides to hydrate and help support the skin moisture barrier.

• Gentle On Skin: Fragrance free, paraben free, non-comedogenic, pH-balanced

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Sodium Lauroyl Sarcosinate, Cocamidopropyl Hydroxysultaine, Glycerin, Niacinamide, Gluconolactone, Sodium Methyl Cocoyl Taurate, Peg 150 Pentaerythrityl Tetrastearate, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Ceramide Eop, Carbomer, Calcium Gluconate, Triethyl Citrate, Sodium Benzoate, Sodium Hydroxide, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Cholesterol, Tetrasodium Edta, Caprylyl Glycol, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Trisodium Ethylenediamin Disuccinate, Xanthan Gum, Hectorite, Phytosphingosine, Benzoic Acid (Code F.I.L C274845/2)
metaData.Key Information:
• Developed with dermatologists, CeraVe Blemish Control Face Wash is formulated with 2% salicylic acid to target blemishes and visibly reduce blackheads. Purifying clay improves the appearance of pores. Formulated with Oil-Absorbing Technology, in a refreshing gel-to-foam texture, the CeraVe cleanser for acne-prone skin cleans skin and unclogs pores, targeting blemishes and helping to prevent future breakouts, while maintaining the skin moisture barrier with 3 essential ceramides..

• Formulated with a powerful BHA, this salicylic acid cleanser for acne-prone skin makes an effective exfoliator that helps remove dead skin cells and excess sebum, visibly reducing blackheads and the appearance of pores. This 3 chemical exfoliant is gentle on skin prone to blemishes.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
This effective cleanser for acne-prone skin can be used morning and/or night.
1. Begin by wetting your face and working the CeraVe Blemish Control Cleanser into a lather.
2. Massage onto face, avoiding eyes. Rinse well.
3. Follow application with the CeraVe Salicylic Blemish Control Gel for targeted approach to pimples. Read our guide to salicylic acid for pimples to learn more.

Polyglyceryl-2 Dipolyhydroxystearate. Decyl Glucoside. C10-18 Triglycerides. Trimethylpentanediol/Adipic Acid/Glycerin Crosspolymer. Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer. Benzoic Acid. Butylene Glycol. Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride. Caprylyl Glycol. Citric Acid. Disodium Edta. Fragrance (Parfum). Glyceryl Behenate. Glyceryl Dibehenate. Oxothiazolidine. Potassium Cetyl Phosphate. Propylene Glycol. Sodium Benzoate. Sodium Hydroxide. Tocopherol. Tocopheryl Glucoside. Tribehenin. Xanthan Gum
metaData.Key Information:
Applied to the face and body, the SPF 50+ Lotion with a moisturising and protective texture offers an immediate and long-lasting feeling of comfort, an anti-drying effect and hydration for six hours. Very high sun protection for sensitive skin exposed to intense sunlight.
At the heart of the SPF 50+ Lotion, sun milk, is the exclusive Sunsitive protection developed by Pierre Fabre Research and composed of :
- A patented filter system containing only four sun filters, for very broad UVB-UVA protection that is stable and effective over time, and optimal skin tolerance.
- Provitamin E (Pre-tocopheryl), a powerful antioxidant, to protect cells against free radicals.
- Avène Thermal Spring Water known for its soothing, anti-irritant and softening properties.
metaData.Preparation:
Advice for use :
Before exposure to the sun, apply generously to the face and neck/or the body (e.g. 2 fingers of product on the forearm). Reapply frequently to maintain protection, especially after sweating, swimming or wiping.
An expert tip :
For easy application spread it your hands and then apply to exposed areas. Then smooth.

product.name: Avene Protect Lotion SPF50

product.name: La Roche-Posay Soothing Lotion - Sensitive Skin

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• AHA/BHA Exfoliant for Face: Formulated as a salicylic acid-enriched gel for blackheads, the beta-hydroxy acid (BHA) works to help target blemishes and help prevent future breakouts, and alpha hydroxy acids (AHA), a blend of Lactic and Glycolic Acids, help smooth and soften skin.

• Pore Minimiser: Helps to minimise the appearance of pores & visibly reduce blackheads. Also formulated with Niacinamide, this gel for acne-prone skin works to comfort the skin, while Hyaluronic Acid helps to support the skin moisture barrier.

• Denatured Alcohol-Free: Gentle, paraben-free, and fragrance-free skin care to avoid potential irritation on sensitive skin. Formulated without drying alcohols like denatured alcohol, which can cause over dryness.

• 3 Essential Ceramides: Found naturally in the skin and make up 50% of the lipids in the skin moisture barrier. All CeraVe products are formulated with three essential ceramides.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Glycerin, Sodium Hydroxide, Glycolic Acid, Lactic Acid, Niacinamide, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Ceramide Eop, Carbomer, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Triethyl Citrate, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Cholesterol, Chlorphenesin, Disodium Edta, Hydroxypropyl Guar, Caprylyl Glycol, Xanthan Gum, Phytosphingosine, Benzoic Acid (Code F.I.L D271240/1)
metaData.Key Information: • Developed with Dermatologists, CeraVe Blemish Control Gel is a lightweight, hydrating full-face AHA/BHA gel that helps target blemishes and helps prevent future breakouts, while minimising the appearance of pores without over-drying the skin. Formulated with 3 essential ceramides to help support the skin moisture barrier and niacinamide to help comfort skin. Recommended for use once per day in the evening, this salicylic acid enriched gel formula with a effective blend of AHA and BHA is oil-free and free of drying alcohol, leaving skin looking more radiant, smooth and visibly clearer after 3 days.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
This effective AHA/BHA gel for acne-prone skin can be used morning and/or night.
1.Cleanse the skin thoroughly before applying with the CeraVe Blemish Control Gel.
2.Cover the entire face with a thin layer of the gel one to three times daily, avoiding the eye area and lips.
3.Sun sensitivity can increase while using this product. Please apply CeraVe AM Facial Moisturising Lotion and your preferred broad-spectrum SPF 50 sun protection during the day on top of the CeraVe Blemish Control Salicylic Acid Gel.

product.name: Cerave Acne Blemish Control Gel

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
- Suitable for normal to dry skin on the face and body.
- Gently removes dirt, oil and makeup without leaving skin tight or dry

- MVE Technology: This delivery system continually releases moisturizing ingredients for 48-hour hydration - supporting your protective skin barrier, long after you've finished applying.
- Ceramides: Help maintain the skin's natural barrier
- Hyaluronic acid: Helps retain skin's natural moisture
- Non-comedogenic and fragrance-free
- Developed with dermatologists

- Accepted by the National Eczema Association and American Diabetes Association

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua/Water, Glycerin, Cetearyl Alcohol, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Cetyl Alcohol, Ceteareth-20, Petrolatum, Dimethicone, Phenoxyethanol, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Potassium Phosphate, Ethylhexylglycerin, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Disodium Edta, Dipotassium Phosphate, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Phytosphingosine, Cholesterol, Xanthan Gum, Carbomer, Sodium Hyaluronate, Tocopherol, Ceramide Eop
metaData.Key Information:
- CeraVe Hydrating Cleanser was developed with dermatologists to cleanse and refresh the skin without over-stripping it or leaving it feeling tight and dry. Featuring three types of essential ceramides for skin to help strengthen the skin's protective barrier and hydrating hyaluronic acid, this non-comedogenic face wash is an effective yet non-irritating way to start off any skincare regimen for normal to dry skin - and it uses MVE Technology to provide 24 hour hydration.

- CeraVe Moisturizing Cream is a rich, non-greasy, fast-absorbing moisturizer for normal to dry skin on the face and body. Formulated with three essential ceramides, it works to lock in skin's moisture and help maintain your skin's protective barrier. Our moisturizing cream also features hyaluronic acid, petrolatum, and MVE Delivery Technology - which works by continually releasing moisturizing ingredients for long-lasting hydration.
metaData.Preparation:
- Directions:
1. Wet skin with lukewarm water
2. Massage the cleanser into skin in a gentle, circular motion
3. Rinse and gently pat skin dry.

product.name: Cerave Travel Kit

1. Squeeze a small amount on palm
2. Massage onto wet skin
3. Rinse with water
4. If wash gets into eyes, rinse thoroughly with water

offers.description: Buy 1 Simple Foam Facial Wash - Moisturising @ $9.90

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more

product.description:
• The CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum has multiple benefits that address various skin concerns.A few key benefits you may note when using the retinol serum daily:

• Helps to reduce hyperpigmentation and post-blemish dark spots.
• Promotes the cell renewal process, helping skin look brighter
• Helps to even out uneven skin tone and texture. As retinol is an exfoliating ingredient, it helps remove built-up dirt, impurities and dead skin cells that may likely clog pores.
• Ceramides help to support the skin moisture barrier and overall skin health.
• This gentle formulation is fragrance-free. paraben-free, and non-comedogenic, which means that it will not clog pores that likely lead to blemishes or mild-acne.
• The encapsulated retinol in the serum helps avoid potential irritation to the skin, making it a suitable retinol serum for sensitive skin types.

metaData.Ingredients: Aqua/Water/Eau, Propanediol, Dimethicone, Cetearyl Ethylhexanoate, Niacinamide, Ammonium Polyacryloyldimethyl Taurate, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Hydrogenated Lecithin, Potassium Phosphate, Ceramide Np, Ceramide Ap, Ceramide Eop, Carbomer, Cetearyl Alcohol, Behentrimonium Methosulfate, Dimethiconol, Lecithin, Sodium Citrate, Retinol, Sodium Hyaluronate, Sodium Lauroyl Lactylate, Cholesterol, Phenoxyethanol, Alcohol, Isopropyl Myristate, Caprylyl Glycol, Citric Acid, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Pentylene Glycol, Phytosphingosine, Xanthan Gum, Polysorbate 20, Ethylhexylglycerin
metaData.Key Information:
• Acne marks and uneven skin tone can be constant reminders of breakouts, even after your acne is under control. An effective way to reduce the appearance of acne marks (also called post-inflammatory hyperpigmentation) and visible pores is by using a gentle, yet effective resurfacing serum that works to refine your skin without compromising its protective barrier.

• Developed with dermatologists, CeraVe Resurfacing Retinol Serum helps smooth your skin's texture by reducing the appearance of post-acne marks, minimizing the look of pores and improving your skin’s surface. Our formula contains encapsulated retinol to help resurface your skin, plus licorice root extract to help brighten your skin’s appearance. In addition, it's formulated with 3 essential ceramides that work together to lock in skins moisture and help restore your skin’s protective barrier, along with soothing niacinamide. MVE technology encapsulates ceramides to ensure efficient delivery within the skin’s barrier and slow release over time. Supporting your protective skin barrier, long after you’ve finish applying. Lightweight and fast-absorbing, our resurfacing serum helps restore your even skin tone and promote a healthy-looking complexion.
metaData.Preparation:
Directions:
1. Avoid contact with eyes and lips.
2. If contact occurs, rinse thoroughly with water.
3. If discomfort occurs during the first application, space out applications until skin adjusts.
4. Apply a sunscreen while using this product.

product.name: Cerave Resurfacing Retinol Serum

parentCategory.name: Beauty & Personal Care
parentCategory.tagLine: Bath & body, hair care, facial wash & more
